items.title: Python
items.description: Used Python for academic programming, machine learning workflows, data preprocessing, and technical problem solving.

items.title: Java, JavaScript, SQL, and HTML/CSS
items.description: Worked with core programming and web technologies across academic and project-based work, including front-end interaction and structured database tasks.

items.title: Tools and Platforms
items.description: Experience with GitHub, Jupyter Notebook, Visual Studio Code, Microsoft Excel, and Google Sheets for technical development and data work.

items.title: Frameworks
items.description: Worked with Flask and Streamlit to support practical application development and interface-driven workflows.

items.title: Core Areas
items.description: Focused on data analysis, data visualisation, machine learning, predictive modelling, and database fundamentals.

items.title: Smart Attendance System
items.description: Built a facial-recognition attendance prototype for workplace and school use, aimed at improving attendance tracking, record accuracy, and operational efficiency.

items.title: Health Prediction Projects
items.description: Developed machine learning projects for health-related prediction tasks, including heart disease prediction, using Python, data preprocessing, and model development workflows.

items.title: Lung Disease Detection Research
items.description: Worked on a deep learning project using CT and X-ray image data for early lung disease detection and contributed to a related publication in IJRASET.

items.title: Interactive Multi-Page Web Application
items.description: Built a four-page web application containing a tutorial page, quiz page, AI reflection page, and personalised CV page with dynamic content, interactive logic, and structured presentation.

items.title: Software and Technical Development
items.description: Interested in roles where programming, software development, and structured problem solving can be applied in practical settings.

items.title: Data and Machine Learning
items.description: Interested in using analytical skills, predictive modelling, and machine learning techniques to solve meaningful problems.

items.title: Growth Through Practical Work
items.description: Motivated by opportunities that support learning, adaptability, technical improvement, and long-term professional development.
